channel.title: Incident Response on SOPHY'S CYBERLAB
channel.description: Recent content in Incident Response on SOPHY'S CYBERLAB

item.title: Network Traffic Analysis & Incident Response (Wazuh & PCAP)
item.description: Objective: To perform a technical post-mortem analysis of a network intrusion attempt using centralized log management and deep packet inspection.

item.title: Blockchain Forensics & Incident Post-Mortem (Bitfinex Case Study)
item.description: Objective: To analyze high-scale cryptocurrency heists and identify the critical security failures in private key management that lead to multi-billion dollar losses.
